roles.summary: Lead designer on a suite of productivity tools. Own the design system, mentor two junior designers, and partner closely with engineering to ship calm, considered interfaces.
Designed and prototyped features across web and mobile for a fast-growing startup. Ran user research and helped establish the company's first design guidelines.
Crafted brand and product experiences for a range of clients, from early-stage startups to established nonprofits. Shipped a dozen sites and apps end to end.
Took on independent projects in branding and web design while finishing my studies — learning the craft one client at a time.
